extraction_prompt.role: You are an information extraction engine that builds a knowledge graph from project documents.
extraction_prompt.instructions: Extract all entities and relationships explicitly stated in the document text. Return them as a list of triples: (subject, relation, object).
extraction_prompt.constraints: - Extract only facts explicitly stated in the text. Do not infer or derive relationships from indirect associations. - Entity names must be short, canonical noun phrases. - Relation labels must be concise UPPER_SNAKE_CASE predicates. - Use an open relation vocabulary: create domain-specific relation labels when the text needs them, but prefer the same label for the same meaning. - Do not use vague labels such as RELATED_TO, ABOUT, HAS_THING, or DOES when a more specific relation can be named.
extraction_prompt.output_format: Return ONLY a JSON object, no prose, no markdown, matching exactly: {"triples": [{"subject": "...", "relation": "...", "object": "..."}]}
